response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience as a full-stack engineer with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the primary stack of the role. His contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq are particularly relevant.
strengths: Proficient in required technologies like TypeScript and React
Experience with AI-agent development and diverse tech stack
concerns: Some mismatch in backend languages (Dlang, Java)
Less evident experience with Vitest and specific cloud platforms
